rows.label: tev000501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well, hey there, [ST:playername ]. I was
just thinking about you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0002
rows.name:
I haven't had an assignment with any
real meat on it for a long time. I can
almost feel my skills melting away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0003
rows.name:
So if you've got anything you
could use my help with, I'd
be thrilled to lend a hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm good to go whenever, and
I'll do whatever! Can't ask
for more than that, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nightglow Forest, huh? Plenty of
BLADEs have gone into that dark
forest and never come back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I don't know how much help I'll
be, but if you're willing to give
me a shot, you'll get my best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0031
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0041
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Great! We'll make it out alive if
I've got anything to say about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0013
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0019
rows.name:
I just got orders for my next urgent
assignment. Seems I'm being sent to
Valley of Oblivion with Lieutenant Iriina.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Apparently that region's rife
with dangerous unidentified
indigens AND Growth outposts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'd better try hard not to
get in anyone's way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Man, I'm going to need a lot more
experience in the field before
Iriina trusts me to watch her back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0027
rows.name:
So would you please take me on
your next assignment? Pleeeease?
There's so much I need to learn![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0051
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0060
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Oh, thanks! I'll do my best
not to get in your way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0029
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0034
rows.name:
We barely have any time
left on our Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0035
rows.name:
We gotta reclaim the Central Life before our Blue
Bloods burn out and take our lives with 'em, you
know? ...Er, so you'll let me help with that, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0071
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Oh, thanks! I'll do my best
not to get in your way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0042
rows.name:
I guess they're searching around
the Pathfinder's base. I've got
a bad feeling about this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0043
rows.name:
But I suppose all we can do
is keep banging out assignments,
one after the other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0044
rows.name:
Your next job is in White Woods,
right? Think I could tag along?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0091
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Oh, thanks! I'll do my best
not to get in your way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0046
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Lieutenant Iriina had a lot of
respect for Lao as a BLADE. She
said she trusted him with her life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0052
rows.name:
I can't imagine what she's
going through right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0053
rows.name:
If we find Lao and make him listen to
reason, he might still be able to stop all
this. So come on! Take me with you, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0111
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0054
rows.name:
I'm sure if we just explain to Lao what he's done,
he'll finally realize... I mean, even he has to
be capable of understanding how wrong he was![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0055
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0060
rows.name:
Man, I can't wait to taste some of
Lin's cooking with my real body![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0061
rows.name:
We have to get to the Central
Life. We have to be the ones
who reclaim humanity's future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0131
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0062
rows.name:
I'm a lot better at this than I
used to be. You'll see. You won't
ever have to worry about me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0063
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0068
rows.name:
On our last mission together,
Lieutenant Iriina totally
ordered me to watch her back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0069
rows.name:
I have to start working a whole
lot harder. I have to make sure
I'm worthy of her trust![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0070
rows.name:
Please, I'll go with you anywhere.
I'll do anything. I just need more
experience so I can get stronger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0151
rows.name: Add Gwin to your team.

rows.label: tev000501_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000501_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline Gwin's request for now.

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0071
rows.name:
Oh, thanks! I'll do my best
not to get in your way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000501_MSG0072
rows.name:
Aw, really? Well, if you ever
need me, just say the word.[ST:wait ]
